textByHash.eae2baa31cde6600bd6f887a4b059f0d5de2c176: Calm yourself, my child. We anticipated this eventuality. Go now and prepare the throne for our arrival.
textByHash.800b4d7431372e9ecd6bc4c7ca8bae1588ff1017: So then, , it is just us. What shall we do with you?
textByHash.128fd1f2ec79363f52585d355fe33dd5dd7d3e79: Your mind is like an open book to us. Your very essence laid bare before our sight.
textByHash.609bbae6bfea7073672308e3ff6032a7505d5d46: You have great potential. We should destroy you now, lest you interfere with our plans further.
textByHash.54b523f25de66aac08dd09c0172d6d773c5a5ed1: Or we could take you whole and make you an extension of our will.
textByHash.20b97082cad2dca8798d21201fc6134e6f72282c: After millennia, this husk is almost spent and requires replacement. Yes, you will make an excellent host.
textByHash.9e697afcd092a2718db2b4ad7741c3c89e1bbba1: Yes, that's it, fight, fight with all your heart.
textByHash.cb478b1216f282d1fe7fac1a4533419a97488b37: It's always so much sweeter when they resist us.
textByHash.9e66f63f1a93ee41e803ff86c76797481a06e975: Come with us. Come and be with us for all eternity.
textByHash.4a743cc42e660441b5ff8830e2b063e4ca2d0f60: Ahh, , it is useless to resist. Now we shall become as one.
